query: SELECT participantId, dayNumber, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, SUM(CASE WHEN dayComplete = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completeRows, SUM(pointsAwarded) AS totalPointsInRows, MIN(id) AS minId, MAX(id) AS maxId, MAX(updatedAt) AS latestUpdatedAt FROM daily_logs GROUP BY participantId, dayNumber HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY latestUpdatedAt DESC LIMIT 50;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.8b2c854ea8b3 --database HPubf4auNvt8KXvgrLad5c --execute SELECT participantId, dayNumber, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, SUM(CASE WHEN dayComplete = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completeRows, SUM(pointsAwarded) AS totalPointsInRows, MIN(id) AS minId, MAX(id) AS maxId, MAX(updatedAt) AS latestUpdatedAt FROM daily_logs GROUP BY participantId, dayNumber HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY latestUpdatedAt DESC LIMIT 50;
